title: Runtime Control Room
concept: A dense power-user command deck that makes WordPress, PHP, language, network, multisite, older-version, reset, reload, and local-directory consequences first-class while preserving the live WordPress shell beside save, management, Site Manager, Blueprint, database, log, and portability controls.
focus: runtime settings as the primary object model
local-directory save flow with permission and reload consequences
dense labeled command deck for expert users
stateful file, database, saved-site, and transfer results
flows: Save an unsaved Playground to a local directory end to end with folder picker state, permission grant or denial, file-copy progress, selected folder identity, local storage badge, saved row insertion, preview update, transfer event, and reconnect-after-refresh consequence.
Download database.sqlite end to end from the SQLite-backed database tab with selected path, action progress, updated size/result state, log entry, transfer history, and preview status mutation.
Use the file browser to create, select, dirty, and save files with selected-file metadata, editor state, save result, PHP log entry, and transfer history.
Apply runtime settings with explicit temporary reset versus stored Save & Reload consequences for WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network, and multisite controls.
Launch Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and .zip import through distinct labeled route contracts with real inputs and constraints.
Manage temporary, browser-saved, and local-directory Playgrounds with open/manage, rename, delete confirmation, final row removal, active-shell fallback, and saved/local/temporary differences.
Use Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint, database, logs, Export to GitHub, Download as zip, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions without hiding the active WordPress shell.

Browse a representative subset of the 43 Blueprint gallery entries with current categories/search, selected detail, Blueprint URL, editor, copy, download, run, validation, replacement result, and transfer history.
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start
WordPress PR preview with PR number or URL input
Gutenberg PR or branch preview with PR, URL, or branch input
GitHub import with account connection and token-not-stored caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser framing and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Friends feed reader, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
